summary: Deployment-hardening verification (load_dotenv(ROOT_DIR/'.env', override=False)) — backend only. Re-ran the 12-test pytest suite against the public preview URL (https://whohas-app.preview.emergentagent.com) plus internal backend for the app-level '/' route. Result: 12/12 PASSED in 19.12s. Backend supervisor logs show a clean startup after the change ('WhoHas API started. Live mode: False', no import/env errors), MongoDB connects using MONGO_URL/DB_NAME from env, and Claude Sonnet 4.6 calls via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY are observed hitting LiteLLM successfully. Verified: (1) app-level GET '/' → 200 {status:'ok', service:'WhoHas API'}, (2) GET /api/ → 200 {message, live_mode:false}, (3) POST /api/ask 'Who has the cheapest eggs?' → 200 with summary, direct_answer, items[>=1], non-null product card with name, https image, exactly 3 stores each with a numeric price; cheapest == min(prices) invariant holds and max>min (0.93/1.0/1.08 factors), (4) POST /api/ask 'Who has the cheapest paper towels?' → also returns 3-store card, (5) POST /api/ask 'Who has the most Olympic gold medals?' → 200 with product=null and non-empty items[], (6) GET /api/trending-questions returns Groceries + Household Supplies groups with required fields, (7) GET /api/suggest?q=eggs returns egg-related suggestions; empty q returns [], (8) MongoDB persistence — POST /api/ask inserts a doc into the queries collection (id/question/summary/demo/sources_count/created_at) and it is retrievable via pymongo. Validation cases (422 on too-short/missing question) also pass. No regressions from the load_dotenv(override=False) change.
action_items: None. The load_dotenv(override=False) change is safe: local .env still fills gaps in dev, and platform-injected MONGO_URL/DB_NAME/EMERGENT_LLM_KEY win in production. All 12 backend tests pass.

Informational (unchanged from iteration_2): in the PREVIEW environment, the public '/' is served by the Expo frontend via ingress, so the deployment-platform health check must hit the backend container directly at '/' (verified working on localhost:8001). Not a bug.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:23 — load_dotenv(ROOT_DIR/'.env', override=False) is correct: os.environ values injected by the platform take precedence, .env only provides defaults.
server.py:25-27 — MONGO_URL and DB_NAME are read via os.environ[...] (KeyError-on-missing), which fails fast if config is broken. Good.
server.py:538-540 — @app.get('/') is registered at the app level (outside /api router) so the deployment health check is satisfied without leaking into the API namespace.
server.py:473-476 — Mongo insert uses a custom uuid 'id' and never returns the ObjectId; response is fully JSON-serializable. Good.
seed_data_creation: None. One TEST_persist doc inserted into Mongo 'queries' during test_ask_persists_to_queries and cleaned up in-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_whohas_api.py. Public URL: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (=https://whohas-app.preview.emergentagent.com). Internal backend for the '/' route: http://localhost:8001. Current env: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY set → Claude Sonnet 4.6 answers via LiteLLM; SERPAPI_API_KEY empty → live_mode=false but /api/ask still calls Claude with no web grounding. Product prices are deterministic MOCKED representative values (factors 0.93/1.0/1.08 over a topic base price); cheapest = min of the 3 stores.
rca_of_issue: N/A — deployment-hardening verification, no failures detected.
